overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district during golden hour. The character traverses sidewalks and streets near massive cooling towers and elevated highways, eventually meeting companions and exploring the area with dramatic architecture including a large rocket structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to industrial retaining wall with trash accumulation

events.description: passing a burning barrel emitting smoke on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete wall, approaching an intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with weathered surface running along the right side of the sidewalk
accumulated garbage bags and debris piled against the concrete wall
multi-level highway overpass structure visible in the distance against the skyline
asphalt road with lane markings running parallel to the sidewalk
tall palm tree visible across the street near the road
concrete traffic barriers lining the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow urban sidewalk bordered by a massive concrete retaining wall covered in trash bags. The golden hour sun casts long shadows across the asphalt road to the left, while an elevated highway overpass looms in the distance. The environment suggests a gritty industrial district with accumulated urban decay.

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk and onto the crosswalk to cross the street
meeting two companions - a woman with blue hair and a man in a jacket - who join the walk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and meeting two companions who begin walking alongside

notable_agents.action: female character with blue hair and white helmet standing with arms crossed, then joining the group
male character in jacket and cap standing near the crosswalk, then walking with the group

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk lines on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open intersection, leaving the enclosed sidewalk behind. The camera turns to reveal two companions waiting at the crosswalk - a woman with distinctive blue hair and a man in casual streetwear. They join the character as the group begins walking together toward the industrial complex visible ahead, with the elevated highway structure growing larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach with massive cooling towers in distance

events.description: large cooling towers with 'BARGHEST' signage become clearly visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking with the two companions toward the industrial complex, approaching the massive cooling towers

entered.detail: massive industrial cooling tower with hexagonal base pattern and red signage reading 'BARGHEST'
large industrial facility with geometric facade patterns behind the cooling towers

segments.scene_description: Walking as a group of three along the sidewalk, the scene opens up to reveal the destination: massive industrial cooling towers emblazoned with 'BARGHEST' signage. The sun backlights the structures creating a hazy glow around the steam emissions. The elevated highway runs parallel on the right while the industrial complex looms ahead, dominating the skyline with its scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial monument area with massive cooling towers and rocket structure

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the massive scale of the cooling towers
camera continues tilting up to reveal a massive white rocket spacecraft structure against the sky

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up and admire the massive industrial structures and the rocket towering overhead

entered.detail: massive white rocket with blue stripes and multiple boosters towering vertically against the sky
enormous industrial facility with intricate geometric paneling visible behind the cooling towers

segments.scene_description: The group stops to gaze upward at the monumental scale of the industrial architecture. The camera tilts up dramatically, revealing the full height of the cooling towers with steam billowing from the top, then continues upward to show a massive rocket spacecraft standing vertically against the blue sky. The golden sun creates a brilliant backlight around the structures, emphasizing their immense scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cooling tower row with graffiti-covered structures

events.description: camera tilts back down to street level and continues walking past the row of cooling towers

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk past the row of massive cooling towers with companions, moving deeper into the industrial zone

entered.detail: series of multiple cooling towers lined up in a row, covered in colorful graffiti and street art
patches of dry grass and weeds growing around the base of the industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and continues walking alongside the row of massive cooling towers. The group moves past the graffiti-covered industrial structures, with dry vegetation visible at their bases. The elevated highway remains visible in the background as the characters proceed deeper into the industrial district, the cooling towers now passing by on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty urban corridor that gradually opens into a monumental industrial complex under a golden sunset. It begins with a character walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a concrete wall and trash bags, moving past long shadows toward a distant highway overpass. As the character crosses an open intersection, the camera turns to include two companions who join the group, shifting the perspective toward a sprawling industrial zone. The scene then expands to reveal massive cooling towers emblazoned with Barghest signage, with the camera tilting upward to capture billowing steam and a towering rocket spacecraft silhouetted against the brilliant backlight of the sun. Finally, the camera returns to street level to follow the group as they walk past graffiti-covered structures and dry vegetation, moving deeper into the district with the cooling towers looming on the right.
